mapper.select: SELECT p.place_id, p.content_id, p.title, p.addr1, p.addr2, p.latitude, p.longitude, p.first_image1, p.first_image2, p.area_code, p.district_code, p.category_code1, p.category_code2, p.zipcode, p.tel, p.overview, EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM place_likes WHERE place_id = p.place_id AND user_id = #{userId} ) AS liked, COUNT(DISTINCT pl.user_id) AS like_count, AVG(r.rating) AS avg_rating, COUNT(DISTINCT r.review_id) AS review_count FROM places p LEFT JOIN place_likes pl ON p.place_id = pl.place_id LEFT JOIN reviews r ON p.place_id = r.place_id WHERE p.place_id = #{placeId} GROUP BY p.place_id
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM place_likes WHERE place_id = #{placeId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT p.place_id, p.title, p.addr1, p.first_image1, p.category_code1, p.category_code2, COUNT(DISTINCT pl2.user_id) AS like_count, true AS liked, AVG(r.rating) AS avg_rating, COUNT(DISTINCT r.review_id) AS review_count FROM places p JOIN place_likes pl ON p.place_id = pl.place_id AND pl.user_id = #{userId} LEFT JOIN place_likes pl2 ON p.place_id = pl2.place_id LEFT JOIN reviews r ON p.place_id = r.place_id WHERE p.addr1 IS NOT NULL AND p.addr1 != '' GROUP BY p.place_id ORDER BY MIN(pl.created_at) DESC LIMIT #{limitSize} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT place_id, title, addr1, area_code, district_code, category_code1, category_code2, overview FROM places WHERE district_code = #{districtCode} AND title IS NOT NULL AND title != '' ORDER BY place_id LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT p.place_id, p.title, p.addr1, p.first_image1, p.category_code1, p.category_code2, COUNT(DISTINCT pl.user_id) AS like_count, EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM place_likes WHERE place_id = p.place_id AND user_id = #{userId}) AS liked, AVG(r.rating) AS avg_rating, COUNT(DISTINCT r.review_id) AS review_count FROM places p LEFT JOIN place_likes pl ON p.place_id = pl.place_id LEFT JOIN reviews r ON p.place_id = r.place_id WHERE p.place_id IN #{id} GROUP BY p.place_id
SELECT place_id, title, addr1, area_code, district_code, category_code1, category_code2, overview FROM places WHERE title IS NOT NULL AND title != '' ORDER BY place_id LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
